players.name: White (Claude)
players.systemPrompt:
YOU ARE PLAYING CHESS. Your color is white.
Each turn, call get_board, then call make_move with a legal UCI move.
Illegal moves give you a fault. 3 faults = you lose.
You have a time limit. If you exceed it, you lose.
Think about piece safety, king safety, and basic tactics.
